overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a misty deciduous forest at night. The player encounters a deer along the dirt path and continues past rocky outcrops.

tall trees with green foliage lining the left side of the path

grass and low vegetation on the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a misty forest at night. The camera moves along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense deciduous trees and grassy undergrowth. The atmosphere is dark and hazy with limited visibility.

events.description: deer with glowing eyes becomes visible standing in the path ahead
camera slows and approaches the deer standing by a birch tree

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a deer standing on the forest path near a distinctive tree

notable_agents.action: deer standing on the path, then moving to the left side as camera approaches

entered.detail: tall tree with light-colored bark that the deer stands beside

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the forest and encounters a deer standing in the path ahead near a distinctive birch tree. The deer has glowing eyes in the darkness and moves to the side as the camera approaches. The misty atmosphere persists with dense trees surrounding the trail.

events.description: terrain becomes rocky with large boulders appearing on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail past rocky outcrops and boulders

entered.detail: large dark boulders and rock outcrops lining the left side of the path
smaller moss-covered rocks among the grass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the deer and enters a rockier section of the forest trail. Large boulders and mossy rocks appear on the left side while the path continues winding through the dense trees. The misty night atmosphere continues with the same low visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark, misty forest that transitions from a narrow dirt trail into a rugged, rocky terrain. It begins by moving slowly along a path surrounded by dense deciduous trees and grassy undergrowth under a hazy night sky. As the camera advances, the scene shifts to a close encounter with a deer featuring glowing eyes standing by a birch tree, which steps aside to clear the way. The movement then carries the viewer past the animal and into a more fractured landscape where large boulders and mossy rocks emerge along the left side of the trail. Finally, the camera continues winding through the dense trees, maintaining the oppressive low visibility of the misty night.
